blocks.heading: Solution projects
bullets: DeltaCore.API — REST API, Swagger, OpenAPI, API versioning
DeltaCore.Application — application services and use cases
DeltaCore.MVC — optional MVC admin UI (calls API via HttpClient)

blocks.heading: Engineering Portal (separate)
blocks.content: The Engineering Portal is a static documentation site. It is not part of DeltaCore.sln. Source is maintained in portal/ within the private repo and published to a separate public documentation repository via CI.
